query:
SELECT o.id, o.deliveryDuration, o.deliveryDuration IS NULL as is_null, o.deliveryDuration = 0 as is_zero, c.phone
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customerId = c.id
WHERE c.phone IN ('07878886827', '07729292555')
ORDER BY o.id;
